name: High income single earner
description: Employee earning €60,000 annually. INPS contributions (9.19% standard rate, no cut for high earners) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. Benefits from 2026 rate reduction (33% vs 35% on second bracket). Employment credit phases out above €50,000.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation (Official INPS website)
2026 reduced rate provides savings vs 2025 (€22,000 × 2% rate reduction on second bracket)
